description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the golang:1.9 Docker image. In a global before_script set GOPATH to /builds/go, define REPONAME and GROUPNAME from the project path, prepend $GOPATH/bin to PATH, create the directory $GOPATH/src/gitlab.com/$GROUPNAME, symlink the project directory into it, cd into the project, print the working directory, install the dep tool with go get -u github.com/golang/dep/cmd/dep and run dep ensure. Add a build job (implicitly in the test stage) that executes go test ./... -v -cover followed by go build, and configure it to publish the resulting gitlab-patcher binary as an artifact that expires after one week.
